<!-- GENERATED by bin/build-adapters from plugins/drupal-dkan-ai — do not edit; re-run the script -->

Reference and decision support for writing custom modules that extend the Drupal AI module (drupal/ai, drupal/ai_agents, drupal/ai_assistant_api). Loads when the user is writing Provider, FunctionCall (Tool), AiAgent, AiAssistantAction, or AiAutomatorType plugins, or when working with the AI module's plugin discovery, services, or extension points. Targets drupal/ai 1.3.x; refuses 2.0.x as unstable.

Before writing or modifying code here, read the canonical guide and its detail docs:

- Guide: `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/drupal-ai-module/SKILL.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/drupal-ai-module/reference/ai-search-rag.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/drupal-ai-module/reference/pitfalls.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/drupal-ai-module/reference/plugin-types.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/drupal-ai-module/reference/services.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/drupal-ai-module/reference/testing-ai-plugins.md`

These docs are the single source of truth; do not restate their contents here.
